texto: The answers would come to her. No need to rush them. Ten years ago, but so well remember it was as if it had happened yesterday, she had suffered the repercussions brought on by thoughtless rushing. This time, she would wait. Not wait for him to act, like she had been doing these past months. She would wait to see how she would act.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Anne Cherian: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “The answers would come to her. No need to rush them. Ten years ago, but so well remember it was a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, feminism, would pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
